_comment: Seed entries for the Nebius Dev Advocates directory. Mockup data — adapted from publicly visible LinkedIn profiles of Nebius DevRel + adjacent community.

advocates.name: Colin Lumbergh
advocates.title: Lead Developer Advocate, Nebius
advocates.bio: Runs the Nebius Builders Network and works with community ambassadors hosting events worldwide. Background: forward-deployed engineering, DevRel at multiple AI infra companies, organizer of countless dev meetups and hackathons. Based in San Francisco; happy to grab coffee with any Bay Area builder.

advocates.name: Sujee Maniyam
advocates.title: AI Developer Advocate, Nebius
advocates.bio: 25 years across AI (GenAI, ML, deep learning), data engineering, distributed systems, and cloud. Author (O'Reilly, Packt), speaker, and former technical trainer. Hands-on with Spark, TensorFlow, Python, and scalable system design. Bay Area-based — best fit for fine-tuning, MLOps, and data-pipeline questions.

advocates.name: Marouane Khoukh
advocates.title: Technical Developer Advocate, Nebius
advocates.bio: AI engineer based in Germany. Focused on Nebius Serverless (Jobs + Endpoints), Soperator (Slurm on Kubernetes), and end-to-end fine-tuning workflows. Master's in AI for Smart Sensors / Actuators (Deggendorf). Previously AI Evangelist at Genesis Cloud. Speaks at Nebius.Build/BER, AI Conference Berlin, and similar.

advocates.name: AbdulMajed Raja
advocates.title: Developer Advocate (AI), Nebius
advocates.bio: AI DevRel and content creator with 100K+ subscribers and 14M+ views on YouTube. Co-founder of LittleCoder Labs. Previously at fal (Creativity x Developer Relations), Atlassian (Data Science), and Cisco. Best fit for agents, real-time inference, and post-training questions. Bengaluru-based.
